summary: Comprehensive testing of Global Jobs Consulting recruitment website completed. Backend APIs 100% functional, frontend mostly working with one candidate form issue identified.

ui_bugs.issue: Form submission failing with error message 'A apărut o eroare. Vă rugăm încercați din nou.'

integration_issues.issue: Form validation or backend processing error preventing successful submission

issues: Mobile menu DialogContent missing DialogTitle accessibility warning

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix candidate form submission issue - investigate validation error or backend processing problem causing form submission to fail with error message
